selectionPolicy.rebuildRule: If queue-index.json is missing, stale, or disagrees materially with task state, trust state.json and rebuild the index from task folders.
selectionPolicy.orderingRule: Across preferred groups, group preference wins first, then lower automation.selectionOrder, then task id.

groups.completed_archive_hint: Archive older completed tasks out of the hot queue path before this surface grows into high hundreds or thousands.

notes: This index is intentionally small and selection-focused.
Workers should read this file before task states, then verify only the referenced candidate states until one task is selected.
Queue order is explicit here; do not linear-scan the full task tree when the index is healthy.
Use automation.selectionOrder for intentional proof-task or hotfix prioritization without renumbering task ids.
